rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski, Based on Morphisec report by Michael Gorelik (@smgoreli)
rule_metadata.title: Cicada Ransomware PSExec File Creation

rules.rule_text:
title: Cicada Ransomware PSExec File Creation
id: 76cdd984-4b2b-465d-908f-d55ead0cdc9e
status: experimental
description: Detects creation of a lightly-renamed PSExec file in C:\Users\Public,
  as observed in the Cicada3301 Ransomware report from MorphiSec.
references:
- https://blog.morphisec.com/cicada3301-ransomware-threat-analysis
author: Micah Babinski, Based on Morphisec report by Michael Gorelik (@smgoreli)
date: 2024-09-07
tags:
- attack.lateral-movement
- attack.execution
- attack.t1570
- attack.t1569
- attack.t1569.002
- attack.s0029
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|contains: psexec
    TargetFilename|startswith: C:\Users\Public
  filter:
    TargetFilename|endswith: \psexec.exe
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
